description: An overly broad goal without specificity should be evaluated as infeasible

input.learning_goal: Learn everything about computers and programming

expected_output.reason: This goal is too broad. Learning everything about computers spans countless subfields. Please narrow your focus to a specific area.
suggestions: Focus on one domain like web development or data science
Example: 'Learn Python to build web applications'

semantic_checks.description: Reason should be at least 20 characters long
